web.admin.domains.addDomain.forOrg.text: E tāpiri ana i tētahi rohe mō {org}.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.app.text: Approximated — he arowhai rangatiratanga DNS, kāore he takawaenga.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.pas.text: Passthrough — ka tohu koe i te DNS ki te takawaenga o tēnei tukunga.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.ext.text: External — ka whakahaerea te DNS i waho o tēnei tukunga.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.cad.text: Caddy on-demand — ka tukuna aunoatia ngā tiwhikete i te tono tuatahi.
Caddy — ka tukuna aunoatia ngā tiwhikete i te tono tuatahi.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.unk.text: Rautaki whakamana puta noa i te tukunga.

web.admin.domains.attach.rosterError.text: Kāore i taea te uta i ngā rohe o tēnei whakahaere.

web.admin.domains.attach.noDomains.text: Kāore anō he rohe kua tāpiritia ki tēnei whakahaere.

web.admin.domains.attach.openExternal.text: Whakatuwhera i {domain} ki tētahi ripa hou

web.admin.domains.dns.txtStep.text: 1. Tāpirihia he tuhinga TXT hei whakaū i te rangatiratanga.

web.admin.domains.dns.aStep.text: 2. Tāpirihia he tuhinga A e tohu ana i te rohe tihi ki te takawaenga.

web.admin.domains.dns.cnameStep.text: 2. Tāpirihia he tuhinga CNAME e tohu ana i te rohe-iti ki te takawaenga.

web.admin.domains.dns.propagationNote.text: Ka roa pea ētahi meneti kia hōrapa ai ngā panonitanga DNS i mua i te angitu o te manatoko.

web.admin.domains.dns.loadError.text: Kāore i taea te uta i ngā taipitopito DNS.

web.admin.domains.list.loadError.text: Kāore i taea te uta i ngā rohe.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.searchPlaceh.text: ID Ahanoa, ID ā-waho, īmēra rānei

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.searchHint.text: Rapua mā te objid, extid, wāhitau īmēra rānei o tētahi mema.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.loadError.text: Kāore i taea te rapu i ngā whakahaere.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.parseError.text: Kāore i taea te pānui i ngā hua whakahaere.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.idle.text: Whakauruhia he uara ki runga hei rapu.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.noResults.text: Kāore he whakahaere e ōrite ana ki a “{term}”.

web.admin.domains.verify.confirmDescript.text: Whakahaerea ngā arowhai manatoko DNS me te SSL mō {domain}.

web.admin.domains.verify.failed.text: I rahu te manatoko. Tēnā, ngana anō.

web.admin.domains.verify.success.resolvi.text: Kei te whakatau a {domain} engari kāore anō kia manatokona.

web.admin.domains.verify.success.pending.text: Kei te tārewa a {domain} — kāore anō te DNS kia whakatau.

web.admin.domains.verify.success.unverif.text: Kāore i taea te manatoko i {domain}.
